modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble installing Papercut printer on USD computer

full_description_text: 
I was trying to help someone set up the Papercut printer on their USD computer. They said it was a multifunction device but were not sure how to install it. We were on Windows 11 and MacOS, but it just wasn't working right.
short_description: Trouble installing Papercut printer on USD computer
description: I was trying to help someone set up the Papercut printer on their USD computer. They said it was a multifunction device but were not sure how to install it. We were on Windows 11 and MacOS, but it just wasn't working right.
